local_conditional: P(SES | country, region_state, education_level, occupation_family, income_bucket, household_type)
notes: Composite socioeconomic position; should be derived mostly from observed macro variables, not sampled independently.

values: student; early_career; family_building; midlife; empty_nester; retired
local_conditional: P(life_stage | age_bucket, employment_status, marital_status, children_status, household_type)
primary_sources: census/ACS household, labor force, age tables
notes: Can map directly to schema life_stage while also conditioning behavior modules.

local_conditional: P(urban_lifestyle | country, region_state, urbanicity, income_bucket, occupation_family)
primary_sources: census/ACS urbanicity, commute, housing, occupation tables
notes: Captures access, density, commute, and urban consumption patterns beyond the raw urbanicity category.

local_conditional: P(digital_fluency | age_bucket, education_level, occupation_family, income_bucket, urbanicity)
primary_sources: NTIA/Eurostat/OECD digital access surveys + census covariates
notes: Bridge variable for technology, online behavior, app adoption, and digital payment preferences.

local_conditional: P(price_sensitivity | income_bucket, SES, household_type, children_status, country)
primary_sources: consumer expenditure surveys, finance surveys, inferred behavioral panels
notes: Useful for shopping preferences, discount seeking, value orientation, and product substitution behavior.

local_conditional: P(risk_tolerance | age_bucket, income_bucket, education_level, occupation_family, gender)
primary_sources: DOSPERT-style surveys, finance surveys, GSS/WVS, model-derived fallback
notes: Use as a shared parent for risk dimensions rather than independently sampling each risk attribute.

local_conditional: P(novelty_seeking | age_bucket, education_level, urbanicity, digital_fluency, country)
primary_sources: psychometric surveys, consumer trend surveys, platform behavior, model-derived fallback
notes: Controls early adoption, exploratory interests, and preference for new products/media.

local_conditional: P(health_orientation | age_bucket, gender, country, income_bucket, education_level)
notes: Separates health-conscious behavior from actual health status; avoid inferring sensitive conditions without evidence.

local_conditional: P(family_responsibility | age_bucket, marital_status, children_status, household_type, employment_status)
notes: Captures caregiving/household responsibility without needing every family-related attribute to depend on every macro variable.

local_conditional: P(career_orientation | age_bucket, education_level, employment_status, occupation_family, income_bucket)
primary_sources: labor force surveys, career surveys, LinkedIn-like behavioral data fallback
notes: Shared factor for ambition, professional identity, upskilling, and work-centered time allocation.

local_conditional: P(social_orientation | age_bucket, country, urbanicity, household_type, digital_fluency)
notes: Can condition both offline community orientation and online social/media behavior.

local_conditional: P(environmental_consciousness | country, education_level, age_bucket, urbanicity, income_bucket)
notes: Conditions sustainability, climate, and eco-conscious consumption attributes.

local_conditional: P(brand_consciousness | income_bucket, SES, age_bucket, urbanicity, media_culture)
primary_sources: consumer surveys, marketing panels, platform behavior
notes: Useful for loyalty, premium preference, and brand/status signaling attributes.

local_conditional: P(time_scarcity | employment_status, occupation_family, children_status, household_type, urban_lifestyle)
primary_sources: ATUS/time-use surveys, labor surveys, commute data
notes: Shared parent for convenience seeking, productivity tools, terse communication, and service preferences.

local_conditional: P(financial_security_orientation | income_bucket, SES, age_bucket, household_type, children_status, employment_status)
primary_sources: consumer finance surveys, retirement/security surveys, CPS/ACS covariates
notes: Captures security/savings/debt-aversion orientation distinct from current income.
